title: stelis hispida
intro: Stelis hispida, also known as the hispid stelis, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Stelis hispida include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. Herbal preparations of Stelis hispida include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
